---
format: 
  html:
    theme: meds-website-styles.scss
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
---

## {{< fa download title="download" >}} Pre-workshop prep {#setup}

Please work through the following installations and configurations before attending the workshop:

### 1. Check for Python & install, if necessary

::: {.panel-tabset}
## {{< fa brands apple >}} Mac

## {{< fa brands windows >}} Windows
:::

### 2. Install Positron & necessary extensions

### 3. Install `miniforge3`
